title: MCP Tokens
subtitle: bearer · authorise /mcp
blurb: Tokens are stored as sha256(plaintext) — the value is shown once on creation and never recoverable again. Revoke is immediate.

connection.title: MCP connection
connection.help: Register /mcp as the MCP client endpoint and send an issued sdt_ token in the Bearer header. After a client connects, the token's last used value updates below.

list.title: Existing tokens

empty.title: no tokens yet
empty.subtitle: Issue your first MCP token above and paste it into your MCP client's .mcp.json.

list.confirmRevoke: Revoke this token? MCP authentication using it will fail immediately.

reveal.title: One-time token reveal
reveal.subtitle: Copy {{name}} now — this is the only time the plaintext is shown.
